title: Figure 8 in A novel rapid visual detection assay for Toxoplasma gondii combining recombinase-aided amplification and lateral flow dipstick coupled with CRISPR-Cas13a fluorescence (RAA-Cas13a-LFD)
author: Zhao, Jinhong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 8. Toxoplasma gondii detected in the blood samples via RAA-Cas13a-LFD and qPCR. (A) Visual inspection of RAA-Cas13a-LFD; (B) Curves for qPCR. Strip and curves: 1–4: positive sample; 5–8: negative samples; PP: Positive plasmid of T. gondii; NTC: negative control (ddH2O).
steps_raw: Figure 8. Toxoplasma gondii detected in the blood samples via RAA-Cas13a-LFD and qPCR. (A) Visual inspection of RAA-Cas13a-LFD; (B) Curves for qPCR. Strip and curves: 1–4: positive sample; 5–8: negative samples; PP: Positive plasmid of T. gondii; NTC: negative control (ddH2O).
